Hero.title: Careers
Hero.description: Build your brilliant translation career path with us!

Introduction.title: Build a new beginning
Introduction.description1: Looking for a translation service company matching your expertise, in a dynamic and creative workplace? Are you a language-major student seeking translation job opportunities while still in university? Apply to S-LOKA today and build your brilliant career path.
Introduction.description2: Founded in January 2024, S-LOKA aims to become a professional, world-class translation service provider.
Introduction.description3: We understand that people are the key to a company's success, so S-LOKA always welcomes talents studying and living around the world.

development.name: Enhance soft skills and professional skills

Suggestion.title: Open positions
Suggestion.description: S-LOKA is expanding opportunities for all ages, especially final-year students, to help you gain experience while still at university.

Hero.title: About S-LOKA
Hero.description: How has S-LOKA Services JSC been formed and developed?

Introduction.description1: S-Loka was founded with the ambition to build a professional translation service provider, putting quality at the core and creating a workplace like a second home for our people.
Introduction.description2: S-Loka officially launched in January 2024 with an initial team of 9. With at least 2 years of hands-on experience, our members bring certified expertise and dedication to deliver the best language services.

Mission.title: Mission
Mission.description: S-Loka's mission is rooted in delivering language services safely, innovatively and tech-integrated, fostering deep understanding across diverse cultures with proper localization adaptability, and building a strong alliance between linguists and LSPs in Vietnam.

Vision.title: Vision
Vision.description: S-Loka aims to become a fast-growing, tech-driven, secure and innovative language service provider, evolving to be the best LPS for enterprises in creative transformation and localization in Vietnam and the region by 2025.

Values.title: Core values
Values.description: S-Loka's core values form the foundation of our service philosophy.

reason1.title: Cultural understanding
reason1.description: is our first strength to bridge your language gap to the target market. Our team deeply understands cultures across countries and regions, crafting content that resonates emotionally and amplifies your brand voice.

reason2.title: Domain expertise
reason2.description: is ensured. Our team comprises experts in healthcare, marketing, legal, engineering and more. Their expertise is reinforced by daily hands-on experience, ensuring correct terminology usage and adherence to required standards.

reason3.title: Quality assurance
reason3.description: at the highest level for every delivery. Our rigorous QA includes multiple expert reviews to ensure accuracy, clarity and fluency while preserving the message's intent.

reason4.title: Security and safety
reason4.description: are paramount principles for everyone at S-Loka. Beyond professional duty, it is our respect for client privacy. We apply strict security measures to keep information safe.

reason5.title: Competitive pricing
reason5.description: while delivering great value is what we strive for. Top-tier translation quality doesn't have to be the most expensive. We offer competitive packages to keep high-quality services within reach.

Hero.description: Expand your knowledge in translation and more with S-Loka

Hero.title: Cooperation
Hero.description: Partner to succeed together on the path of language solutions

Content.title: Collaborate to win
Content.description: On the journey of business and creating value for customers, S-LOKA understands that cooperation is essential. Whether you are an individual or an organization, become our strategic partner today—with fair and high-quality benefits.

Hero.title: Solutions
Hero.description: Brand and language excellence embedded in every S-Loka solution

Introduction.description1: Unleashing the power of language is one of our guiding principles at S-LOKA. We champion creativity while preserving local and cultural identity to honor linguistic beauty.
Introduction.description2: Our solutions are delivered by leading experts and a seasoned PM team, helping your brand voice go far beyond expectations.

Localization.title: Localization
Localization.description: Go beyond translation—together with S-Loka, craft a localized version of your products, services and brand that feels friendly and familiar to foreign markets.

Hero.title: Game
Hero.description: Explore our translation services for game localization at S-Loka

01.title: Subtitle & voice-over for characters and dialogues
01.description: We collaborate with talented voice artists to ensure dubbing, narration and subtitling bring maximum liveliness and quality to your game.

02.title: Game description translation
02.description: Our expert teams and trusted partners worldwide translate and edit descriptions, summaries, guides and installation instructions thoroughly and coherently.

03.title: Game reviews translation
03.description: Translate reviews to provide valuable information to potential players and enhance credibility.

04.title: Translation of game marketing materials
04.description: From website content and blogs to banners and email marketing, we translate your game marketing materials professionally and engagingly.

descriptions.1: Requirement intake: target languages, content scope and special requests.
descriptions.2: Source analysis: assess linguistic, cultural and legal aspects; clarify end users to ensure proper tone and style.

descriptions.1: Team selection: assign linguists with relevant language and market experience.
descriptions.2: Schedule: define timeline for translation, editing and QA stages.
descriptions.3: Support materials: prepare glossaries and style guides for consistency.

descriptions.1: Translate content with cultural/contextual adaptation for the target market.
descriptions.2: Handle cultural specifics, terminology and legal requirements accurately.

descriptions.1: Editors review grammar, spelling, style and flow for natural readability.
descriptions.2: Quality review to ensure cultural fit and consistency with glossaries and style guides.

descriptions.1: Validate formatting and display across devices and channels.
descriptions.2: Verify links and interactions where applicable.

descriptions.1: Submit final draft: Provide the final translation to the client for review and approval. Implement necessary adjustments if requested by the client.
descriptions.2: Deliver completed content: After receiving final approval, content is handed over for publication.

1.title: Experienced translation collaborators
1.description: S-Loka proudly has a team of nearly 100 collaborators who are top-tier translators. Our translators are carefully selected and have a solid knowledge foundation in the field of game translation. They have extensive experience in building game scripts and deeply understand game terminology as well as in-game narratives. S-Loka's translators possess in-depth knowledge of over 50 languages and 100 specialized fields, combined with a quality management system for services and products meeting ISO 9001:2015 standards.

2.title: Advanced technology
2.description: Advanced technology and modern testing software such as memoQ, WordFast, Trados, Google API to ensure translation progress and verify the accuracy of the game translation process, helping to maximize prevention of spelling and semantic errors. Modern technology helps increase cost efficiency and save time.

3.title: NDA information security
3.description: S-Loka commits to information security through NDA agreements and fully complies with legal regulations in Vietnam. We always ensure that game information is kept absolutely confidential, and translation units must bear full legal responsibility if they violate contract principles.

Hero.title: Notarized translation

01.title: PERSONAL DOCUMENTS
01.description: Academic transcripts, report cards, national IDs, driver's licenses, passports, land‑use certificates, marriage certificates and more for legal use abroad.

02.title: BUSINESS DOCUMENTS
02.description: Business registration, tax registration, company charter, financial statements, tax reports and other corporate records.

03.title: COMMERCIAL CONTRACTS
03.description: Agreements, MOUs and cross‑border business contracts—translated and notarized to ensure legal validity.

04.title: IMMIGRATION & VISA FILES
04.description: Invitation letters, work permits, visa applications and other immigration documents.

05.title: FINANCIAL DOCUMENTS

descriptions.1: Intake: Gather details on content, target languages, scope and special requirements.
descriptions.2: Assessment: Review documents to determine legal requirements and the appropriate translation/notarization approach.

descriptions.1: Team selection: Assign linguists with the right legal and domain expertise.
descriptions.2: Schedule: Define timelines for translation, editing, QA and notarization.
descriptions.3: Assets: Provide glossaries and style guides to ensure consistency.

descriptions.1: Documents are translated by professional linguists with relevant domain expertise, ensuring accuracy and compliance.
Editing: Review grammar, terminology and style for fluency and clarity.
descriptions.2: Quality check: Validate legal terminology and cultural fit before notarization.

descriptions.1: After QA, documents are notarized by authorized offices to certify accuracy and legal validity against the source.
Deliver notarized documents with seals/signatures. Clients receive both the original and notarized translation for immediate legal use.

Hero.title: Industry-Specialized Translation
Hero.description: Explore specialized translation solutions at S-Loka

Major.serviceHeading: Our specialized translation fields for this solution
Major.serviceEnding: And we offer many other specialized translation services tailored to your needs

01.title: FINANCIAL-ECONOMIC TRANSLATION
01.description:
Financial statement translation, commercial contract translation, market research translation,
 financial analysis document translation, business plan translation,
 audit report translation,...

02.title: MEDICAL TRANSLATION
02.description:
Medical record translation, medical report translation, drug instruction leaflet translation,
 scientific research translation, research contract translation,
 medical training document translation,...

03.title: AUTOMOTIVE ENGINEERING TRANSLATION
03.description:
Car manual translation, technical document translation,
 technical drawing translation, spare parts sales contract translation,
 quality inspection report translation, technical training document translation,...

04.title: TOURISM SERVICE TRANSLATION
04.description:
Tourism website translation, travel guidebook translation,
 restaurant menu translation, tour program translation,
 travel itinerary translation, tourism contract translation,...

05.title: HOSPITALITY TRANSLATION
05.description:
Menu translation, restaurant/hotel website translation,
 advertising material translation, service manual translation,
 internal regulation translation, service contract translation,...

descriptions.1: S-Loka receives customer requests including: source/target language pairs, specialty, translation field, timeline and location, number of participants...
Based on analysis, project managers select the most suitable linguists with relevant expertise & experience to ensure the best quality.
descriptions.2: Client receives the implementation plan. After approval, the contract is signed and the first payment is made.

descriptions.1: Documents are sent to linguists with deep expertise in the relevant field. Linguists apply specialized terminology and knowledge to ensure high accuracy while maintaining original meaning and target language context.
After translation, documents are edited and checked by specialized editors to ensure terminology accuracy, consistency and professional elements, ensuring the highest standards.
Translated documents, after content check, undergo format check (layout, images, tables) to ensure compatibility with the original and ease of use in professional environments.
Final translation is delivered to the client as requested. After receipt, clients can provide feedback or request adjustments. We are ready to support edits to ensure maximum satisfaction.

1.title: Professional Linguist Team
1.description: We possess a team of highly qualified linguists with international language certificates, rich experience and deep understanding of various fields, all carefully selected and trained.

2.title: Advanced Technology
2.description: We use advanced CAT tools like Trados Studio, MemoQ, Wordfast, etc., to optimize the process, maximize accuracy and consistency, and shorten translation time for efficiency and cost-saving.

3.title: Competitive Pricing
3.description: S-Loka offers services at reasonable costs suitable for every budget, bringing optimal economic efficiency to businesses.

4.title: Absolute Confidentiality
4.description: S-Loka is committed to absolute confidentiality of customer information. All documents are securely protected and never disclosed to any third party.

Hero.title: Escort Interpretation
Hero.description: Learn more about escort interpretation solutions at S-Loka

01.title: BUSINESS INTERPRETING
01.description: Interpreting economic documents, financial reports, business contract interpreting, trade fair interpreting, business negotiations, contract signings, and more.

02.title: MEDICAL INTERPRETING
02.description: Interpreting medical records, medical document translation, interpreting medical seminars, and more.

03.title: TECHNICAL INTERPRETING
03.description: Interpreting technical documents, device manuals, technical drawings, and more.

04.title: SCIENTIFIC INTERPRETING
04.description: Interpreting scientific reports, academic articles, master's theses, doctoral dissertations, and more.

05.title: EDUCATIONAL INTERPRETING
05.description: Interpreting training materials, teaching documents, exam content, and more.

descriptions.1: S-Loka receives customer requests: language pairs, specialization field, date and place, number of participants, etc.
S-Loka consults and proposes interpretation plans. Customers receive detailed execution plans. Once agreed, the contract is signed and the first payment is made.
S-Loka selects the interpreter most suitable for your requirements based on experience and skills.
The assigned interpreter studies the customer and content in advance. Customers may provide documents for review before the event.
S-Loka interpreters attend on time, well-prepared and presentable, aiming to achieve your expected outcomes.
After completion, S-Loka collects customer feedback to evaluate service quality. We continuously improve to better meet future customer needs.

1.title: Experienced Team of Interpreters
1.description: S-Loka boasts a team of interpreters with over 5 years of experience in escort interpretation. Through a rigorous and meticulous recruitment process, we select highly skilled interpreters who possess a deep understanding of the cultures and customs of various countries and are continuously learning to enhance their expertise. Additionally, our interpreters have specialized knowledge in diverse fields such as economics, commerce, technology, medicine, tourism, etc., ensuring all client requirements are met.

2.title: Diverse Service Offerings
2.description: S-Loka can provide escort interpretation services for short-term or long-term trips, for large or small groups of clients, and for various events such as conferences, seminars, exhibitions, etc., according to client requirements. Some escort interpretation services at S-Loka include:

list.5: Interpretation for cultural, international sports events

3.title: Professional Service
3.description: S-Loka always prioritizes customer interests. We are always ready to consult and support clients, ensuring dedicated and thoughtful assistance. Our staff is always cheerful, polite, and professional, guaranteeing absolute customer satisfaction.

CreativeTranslation.reasonTitle: Why choose S‑Loka for interpretation services?

Hero.title: What is creative translation?
Hero.description: Learn what creative translation means at S‑Loka

Definition.definitionTitle: Let your brand speak naturally to global audiences
Definition.definitionDescription: Going global requires more than literal translation. S‑Loka's creative translation adapts message, tone and emotion so your brand resonates authentically with local audiences across markets.

1.title: Definition
1.description: Creative translation is not plain translation. It artfully blends translation and copy creation so not only meaning but also tone, emotion and brand spirit are preserved—building natural empathy and connection with local audiences.

list.2: Builds strong bonds with international customers.
list.3: Elevates brand professionalism and trust in global markets.

3.title: What we creatively translate
3.description: We provide creative translation across marketing and entertainment content, including:

list.Creative marketing translation:: Website content, email marketing, social ads, slogans, flyers, company profiles, brand messaging, packaging, product descriptions and more.
list.Creative entertainment translation:: Film titles and synopses, subtitles, scripts, novels, poetry, journalism, magazines, lyrics, music videos and other creative works.

Hero.title: Creative translation process
Hero.description: Explore S‑Loka's creative translation workflow

Process.processHeading: S‑Loka's creative translation is delivered by seasoned experts through the steps below:

descriptions.1: Collect project info: target languages, subject matter, content scope, objectives, target audience, context, locale culture, brand position and deadline.
Analyze messaging, objectives and audience; research culture and preferences of the target market.
Translate source content into the target language with cultural and contextual appropriateness.
descriptions.2: Handle cultural, domain‑specific and legal nuances accurately.

descriptions.1: Adapt copy to convey intent and emotion effectively, recreating the impact of the original.
Thorough review for grammar, spelling and style by native editors to keep tone and emotion intact.
Submit final for client review and make requested adjustments.
descriptions.2: Deliver the approved content ready for use.

01.title: BUSINESS DOCUMENT DIGITIZATION
01.description: Convert documents such as financial reports, business contracts, and strategic documents from physical to digital format, ensuring easy storage and access.

02.title: LEGAL DOCUMENT DIGITIZATION
02.description: Digitize contracts, legal documents, and related materials, ensuring compliance with legal regulations and information security.

03.description: Convert employee records, recruitment data, and payroll from paper to digital format for easy management and security.

04.description: Process and store medical records, medical reports, and research documents in the healthcare industry to enhance retrieval and management capabilities.

06.title: DIGITIZED DOCUMENT MANAGEMENT AND STORAGE

descriptions.1: Clients provide documents to be digitized and translated, along with specific requirements (target language, digitization format, security standards).
descriptions.2: The service analyzes the document type (business, legal, medical, HR, etc.) and complexity level to propose a processing plan.

descriptions.1: The translation and digitization team evaluates the structure, volume, and sensitivity of documents. The plan includes: completion time, translation process, digitization methods (scanning, data entry), and data security verification steps.

Documents are translated by a professional team with appropriate expertise in the field. The translation process ensures correct use of specialized terminology and accurate content transfer from source documents to the target language.
After translation, documents are converted from physical (paper) or raw digital format (PDF, images) to optimized digital formats (Word, Excel, database).
descriptions.2: This process includes scanning, optical character recognition (OCR), and document formatting.

descriptions.1: After digitization and translation, documents are reviewed for language accuracy and digital format completeness. Ensure translations are not only correct in content but also consistent in presentation and easy to use in digital environments.

Completed translations and digitized documents are handed over to clients according to format requirements. Data will be securely stored and managed on digital platforms or document management systems, helping clients easily access and use long-term.

1.title: Expert translators with deep technical knowledge
1.description: Not just talented linguists, S-Loka's team has hands-on experience in IT fields such as software development, cybersecurity, and artificial intelligence. This ensures they don't just translate words, but deeply understand the technical context, accurately conveying the meaning and spirit of the original text.

2.title: Leading-edge technology
2.description: S-Loka prioritizes applying advanced translation technologies, such as CAT (Computer-Assisted Translation) tools and proprietary IT terminology databases, helping maintain consistency and accuracy across all projects.

3.title: Absolute security
3.description: In an era of cyberattacks and strict regulations, information security is our top priority. Understanding the importance of security in IT, we comply with standards such as NDA and ISO 27001 to protect your sensitive information.

4.title: Code-friendly translation services
4.description: We understand that in IT, format is as important as content. S-Loka provides code-friendly translation services, where we preserve the structure of files like JSON, XML, YAML, and even source code. This ensures your UI strings, application strings, or API documentation are not only accurately translated but also work perfectly after integration.

5.title: 24/7 multi-channel support
5.description: In the IT world, where sprints and releases can happen anytime, S-Loka provides 24/7 multi-channel support. Moreover, our support team has an IT background. We understand the urgency of bug fixes, the importance of on-time system releases, and can communicate in technical language.

1.title: Technical expert team
1.description: Not only language experts, our translation team also has solid technical background in Automation. They understand terms like PLC, SCADA, HMI, and master the operating principles of Distributed Control Systems (DCS).

2.title: Diverse expertise
2.description: Automation includes many sub-fields such as: Robotics, IoT, AI in manufacturing. S-Loka has experts for each area, ensuring high accuracy for all documents, from PLC programming guides to Machine Learning research in predictive maintenance.

3.title: Supporting technology
3.description: We use CAT tools - Computer-Assisted Translation, leading tools like SDL Trados, combined with a rich automation terminology database, ensuring consistency and time savings.

4.title: Optimal security
4.description: In Automation, documents often contain sensitive information about production processes. We apply strict security measures, including NDAs and secure cloud storage, to protect your data.

5.title: On-time, quality delivery
5.description: We understand that in automation, any delay can affect project progress. S-Loka commits to on-time delivery without compromising quality.

Reason.title: Why choose S-Loka for your industry-specific translation needs?
Reason.description: In a dynamic global business landscape, S-Loka understands the essential need for accuracy and cultural fit. At S-Loka, we specialize in providing tailored translation solutions for different industries, ensuring your brand message resonates seamlessly with local audiences worldwide.

reason1.title: Domain expertise
reason1.description: Benefit from S-Loka's deep understanding of terminology and trending language in your translation fields, allowing us to tailor your message seamlessly to the languages of your target markets.

reason2.title: Cultural sensitivity
reason2.description: Leverage our team's inherent knowledge of unique cultures and customs to create culturally appropriate content, ensuring connection with your target audience.

reason3.title: Flexible approach
reason3.description: Utilize terminology tools and local reference materials to adjust the content localization process according to local language and your preferred brand language, ensuring accuracy while maintaining unique brand style.

reason4.title: Consistency
reason4.description: S-Loka's proprietary terminology tools track and manage professional language and key phrases in content, ensuring your brand message is unified and consistent across different markets and media platforms.

reason5.title: Speed and efficiency
reason5.description: Quick to organize local resources for multiple language projects, flexible in scaling workforce when workload increases and needs to be handled in a short time.

reason6.title: Competitive advantage
reason6.description: Leveraging industry-specific experience and expertise, we have the ability to create localized content that has a strong impact on your target audience, bringing resonance to your brand to create a competitive advantage in the global market.
